author: @Meemaster334

text: This thing is such a time capsule. Fun fact: the random, zooming-in scene of the Mario Bros with Peach set to classical music was because back in the day you couldn't upload your own thumbnail for the video, and YT would automatically make one from a frame in the middle of the video. The OG uploader wanted to trick people and destroy their eardrums, so this was a surprisingly effective way to trick people into clicking on it, as that particular end title scene wasn't as well known at the time.

text:
Favorite moments:

(start) NICE OF THE PRINCESS TO INVITE US OVER FOR A PIC-NIC, GAY OO-IGI??
-I HOPE SHE-ADE LOTSA SPAGHETTIIIII!~🎶
LUIGI, LOOOOOOOOOOOOK!!...
0:16 ...THE PRINCESS IS NOW A PERMANENT GUEEEST INONEOFMYSEVENKOOPAHOTELS!! I DAIR YA TO FIND HER IF YA CAN.
0:26 AND YOUUU GOTTA HELP US!!...
0:28 IF YOU NEED INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO GET THROUGH THE SEVEN HO-TAYALS, CHECK OUT THE ENCLOOOOSED INSTRUCTION BOOK-KUH!
0:35 WHERE'D SHE GOOO?!
0:42...N-OOOOOOO!~🎶
0:50 GET READY TO CATCH HER!
-SHE'S NOT COMING DOWN!
-SHE'S UP DEREEEE!
(Mario, Luigi and the Princess randomly appear while Tritsch-Tratsch Polka by Johann Strauss II plays in the background)
1:08 IT'S HARD TO SEE THROUGH THOSE CLOUDS...I HOPE WECANGETRIDOFEM!...GET THE HINT.
1:14: DAH-HAAH! HERE'S THE PROBLEM...TOO MANY TOAST-TERS!
YOU KNOW WHAT THEY SAAY...ALLL TOASTERS TOAST TOAST!!
1:25 MAYBE THERE'S A SWITCH IN ONEOFTHEROOOMS! REMIND ME TO CHEECK.
1:31 WA-UH OH!!
(eternal screaming as Mario is thrown around the pipe and into another area)
WHERE AM III??
1:39 HEY, YOU! GET OFF OF MY CLOUD!!
(Lemmy and his sky hotel fly off with a loud warbly scream)
IT'S BEEEN ONE OF THOSE DAYSS...COME ON, LU-IGI!
1:48 WE AIN'T AFRAID OF NO KOOPAS!...
(Door to hotel disappears in an OWWWW-WOOOOOAAAH!)
1:51 OVER DERE!! WENDY'S HOTEL!
-BEEE CAREFUL! WHEN YOU PINCH WENDY'S PENNIES, THEY PINCH BACK!!

Very loud, but worth the funny :)
